# Testing super().__init__() call in inheritance

class Animal:
    age: int
    
    def __init__(self, age: int):
        self.age = age

class Dog(Animal):
    name: str
    
    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int):
        super().__init__(age)
        self.name = name

dog = Dog("Buddy", 5)
print(dog.age)
print(dog.name)

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# 5
# Buddy
